metadata.subject: Applied Design, Skills and Technologies
metadata.description: Students explore electronic circuit theory, component selection, soldering techniques, and PCB design. This course develops understanding of how electronic circuits function and how to design, build, and troubleshoot electronic systems.
metadata.general_description: An applied course in circuit theory, electronic components, soldering, and PCB design.

big_ideas.statement: Electronics use electrical current and components to accomplish control, amplification, and signal processing functions.
big_ideas.elaboration: Understanding circuit theory, component behaviour, and design principles enables creation of functional electronic devices.

big_ideas.statement: Electronic components have specific characteristics and limitations that determine their suitability for different applications.
big_ideas.elaboration: Proper component selection, rating verification, and circuit design prevent failures and ensure reliable operation.

big_ideas.statement: PCB design and manufacturing require precision, planning, and adherence to standards to ensure functionality and reliability.
big_ideas.elaboration: Quality PCB design, proper fabrication, and assembly practices result in reliable, professional electronic devices.

big_ideas.statement: Electronics design and production require safety awareness, proper handling procedures, and understanding of hazards.
big_ideas.elaboration: Safety practices protect workers and ensure that electronic products are safe for users.

competencies.raw: Design electronic circuits for specific functions and applications
i_can_statements: I can analyze circuit requirements and specifications
I can design circuits using appropriate topologies
I can calculate component values and ratings
I can design power supply and protection circuits

competencies.raw: Plan PCB layouts and design for manufacturability
i_can_statements: I can create schematic diagrams
I can design PCB layouts with proper routing
I can design for signal integrity and EMI reduction
I can design for thermal management and manufacturability

competencies.raw: Design test procedures and troubleshooting approaches
i_can_statements: I can design functional testing procedures
I can plan troubleshooting sequences
I can design test fixtures and harnesses
I can create circuit documentation and schematics

competencies.raw: Evaluate circuit functionality and recommend improvements
i_can_statements: I can test circuits against specifications
I can identify circuit defects and failures
I can analyze circuit performance
I can recommend design improvements
I can construct circuits on breadboards
I can solder components safely and reliably
I can assemble PCBs and manage component placement
I can perform quality control inspections

competencies.raw: Apply circuit theory and component knowledge
i_can_statements: I can identify and test electronic components
I can select appropriate components for circuits
I can understand and apply Ohm's law and circuit analysis
I can understand semiconductor and logic circuits
I can use multimeters and testing equipment
I can test circuit functionality
I can identify and locate circuit faults
I can troubleshoot and repair circuits

competencies.raw: Maintain workshop safety and proper procedures
i_can_statements: I can follow electrical safety procedures
I can handle and dispose of electronic components safely
I can prevent electrostatic discharge (ESD)
I can maintain organized and safe work areas

competencies.raw: Use electronic design and simulation software
i_can_statements: I can use circuit design software
I can use circuit simulation tools
I can use PCB design software
I can perform electrical analysis and verification
I can use multimeters and measurement tools
I can use oscilloscopes and function generators
I can use logic analyzers and diagnostic equipment
I can interpret and analyze test results
I can perform hand soldering safely
I can use soldering equipment correctly
I can work with surface-mount components
I can understand PCB fabrication processes
I can assess new component and microchip technologies
I can understand IoT and embedded systems
I can evaluate wireless and RF technologies
I can identify advanced electronics applications

areas.name: Circuit Theory and Fundamentals
topics: Circuit analysis: Ohm's law and Kirchhoff's laws

areas.name: Electronic Components and Selection
topics: Semiconductors: diodes, transistors, and integrated circuits
